propositions: Epic AC7 requires a full enforcement merge-gate under the canonical command name verify-identity, keeping verify-authorship as a back-compat alias.
The gate must exit non-zero when any enforced (non-grandfathered) event is not certified/verified, forced on via --require-authenticated or governed by config.
The --since flag grandfathers pre-cutover events by commit ancestry: events whose introducing commit does not descend the cutover ref are reported but never fail the gate.
A --format json report emits an array of {event_uuid, ticket_id, commit, author, verdict, display, grandfathered} entries validated against verify_identity_report.schema.json.
A CI merge-gate workflow file must invoke verify-identity --require-authenticated --since and fail the build on non-zero exit.
The CLI-reference drift gate must stay green with verify-identity documented and the alias noted.
